failure.error_msg: Error: Counter value 00100000, expected 1 when sw_req_i is asserted assert LogicArray('00100000', Range(7, 'downto', 0)) == 1 + where LogicArray('00100000', Range(7, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(cvdp_copilot_perf_counters.p_count_o).value + where LogicArrayObject(cvdp_copilot_perf_counters.p_count_o) = HierarchyObject(cvdp_copilot_perf_counters).p_count_o
